title: AiPathFilterPolicy
description: Policy for AiPathFilter registrations made through the ai-path endpoint. Delegates to LlmRunner.runWithTemplate() using an AiFilterContext built from either PromptContributorContext or a GraphEventObjectContext-derived prompt context. The AI executor produces AiFilterResult instructions which are applied through dispatching interpreters based on targetPath.pathType. Persisted filter JSON uses filterType=AI while the endpoint/discovery filter kind remains AI_PATH. Requires filter context that can resolve PromptContext and OperationContext for LLM dispatch.

filterType.description: Persisted filter discriminator — always AI for AI-path filters.
